subcodes.first_line: O thou who art thoughtful and mindful! Praise be to God that thou hast entered beneath the shade of the Tree of Oneness and dwellest in the pavilion of thy Lord's glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متفکر و متذکر حمد خدا را که در ظل سدره احدیت وارد گشتی و در خباء مجد رب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @effort; striving, @goodly deeds; actions
